channel.title: Finance/FinTech on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Finance/FinTech on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Paradigm Raises $1.2B
item.description:
Introduction to Paradigm and Its Investment Strategy  

Paradigm, a crypto VC firm, has recently raised $1.2 billion for its third venture fund (Fund III) to invest in “technical frontier” startups. This move marks a significant expansion of the firm’s investment scope, beyond cryptocurrency investments to include robotics and AI. Founded in 2018 by Matt Huang and Fred Ehrsam, Paradigm has already made investments in notable companies such as drone delivery company Zipline and space startup True Anomaly.

item.title: Wealth Boom
item.description:
Introduction to the Wealth Boom  

The concept of wealth has undergone significant transformations over the years, with the rich continually finding ways to accumulate more wealth. In recent times, the wealth boom has been particularly pronounced, with tech clients being among the primary beneficiaries. As the wealth gap continues to widen, it’s essential to understand what wealth advisers are telling their tech clients and the implications of this trend.
